'''nazhazha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:olam|olam]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-zh-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:olam|olam]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| nazhazha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:næzhæzhæth|næzhæzhæth]] || [[word:næzhæzhæj|næzhæzhæj]] || [[word:næzhæzhæsh|næzhæzhæsh]] || [[word:næzhæzhæ|næzhæzhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nazhazhazhath|nazhazhazhath]] || [[word:nazhazhazhaj|nazhazhazhaj]] || [[word:nazhazhazhash|nazhazhazhash]] || [[word:nazhazhazha|nazhazhazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nazhazhath|nazhazhath]] || [[word:nazhazhaj|nazhazhaj]] || [[word:nazhazhash|nazhazhash]] || [[word:nazhazha|nazhazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nazhafzhath|nazhafzhath]] || [[word:nazhafzhaj|nazhafzhaj]] || [[word:nazhafzhash|nazhafzhash]] || [[word:nazhafzhaf|nazhafzhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nazhazhatha|nazhazhatha]] || [[word:nazhazhaja|nazhazhaja]] || [[word:nazhazhasha|nazhazhasha]] || [[word:nazhazhaka|nazhazhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nazhazhath|nazhazhath]] || [[word:nazhazhaj|nazhazhaj]] || [[word:nazhazhash|nazhazhash]] || [[word:nazhazha|nazhazha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nazhazhathal|nazhazhathal]] || [[word:nazhazhajal|nazhazhajal]] || [[word:nazhazhashal|nazhazhashal]] || [[word:nazhazhakal|nazhazhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nazhazhathatha|nazhazhathatha]] || [[word:nazhazhajaja|nazhazhajaja]] || [[word:nazhazhashasha|nazhazhashasha]] || [[word:nazhazhaka|nazhazhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nazhazhathan|nazhazhathan]] || [[word:nazhazhajan|nazhazhajan]] || [[word:nazhazhashan|nazhazhashan]] || [[word:nazhazhakan|nazhazhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nazhazhathaoro|nazhazhathaoro]] || [[word:nazhazhajaoro|nazhazhajaoro]] || [[word:nazhazhashaoro|nazhazhashaoro]] || [[word:nazhazhakaoro|nazhazhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
